title: Message Envelope
description: Schema defining the mandatory envelope structure for all agent-to-agent and agent-to-system messages. Every message must be loggable as an EventLog entry.

to.description: Recipient identifier (agent ID, system name, or human user).

from.description: Sender identifier (agent ID, system name, or human user).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the message was sent.

message_id.description: UUID7 unique identifier for this message.

blake3_hash.description: BLAKE3 cryptographic hash of the message content for integrity verification.

token_count.description: Number of tokens in the message content.

completion_time_estimate.description: Estimated time to complete the task described in the message.

agent_id.description: Identifier of the agent that generated or is receiving this message.

agent_capability_profile.description: Capability profile of the agent (e.g., scout, analyst, architect, historian).

intent_classification.description: Classification of the message intent (e.g., query, command, update, response, escalation).

correlation_id.description: UUID or identifier linking this message to a related workflow or conversation thread.

event_id.description: EventLog entry ID that this message maps to.
